overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character traversing rain-soaked Gothic rooftops at night. The scene features a stormy atmosphere with a large full moon, neon-lit Art Deco architecture, and the character moving steadily along elevated building edges overlooking the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked rooftop ledge with gothic statue overlook

events.description: Full moon becomes visible through storm clouds, brightening the skyline

agents.ego_description: Batman runs steadily along the rooftop edge, cape flowing behind him as he approaches the illuminated gargoyle structure

entered.detail: Large illuminated stone gargoyle face mounted on the building facade, glowing with warm light against the dark stone
Tall art deco tower with green neon lighting visible in the distance
Safety railing running along the edge of the rooftop, wet from rain
Dense cluster of gothic skyscrapers and industrial structures stretching into the distance

segments.scene_description: Batman traverses a rain-soaked rooftop at night, moving toward a prominent illuminated gargoyle statue. The stormy sky partially obscures the moon while neon-lit towers punctuate the dark skyline. The camera follows closely from behind as the character runs along the elevated ledge, with the city sprawling below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop promenade with full moon view

events.description: Batman passes the gargoyle structure, revealing the full moon and clock tower in the background

agents.ego_description: Batman continues running along the rooftop, passing the gargoyle structure while the full moon illuminates the scene from behind

entered.detail: Large bright full moon dominating the stormy sky, casting pale light across the city
Tall gothic clock tower with illuminated blue spires visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: As Batman continues his rooftop traversal, the full moon breaks through the storm clouds, dramatically illuminating the Gothic architecture. The character passes the gargoyle statue, which falls behind as a prominent clock tower with blue-lit spires comes into view on the right. The scene maintains its rainy, noir atmosphere with the moon providing stark backlighting against the dark cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rain-soaked Gothic rooftop that shifts from a storm-shrouded darkness to a starkly moonlit cityscape. It begins with the camera following closely behind Batman as he runs along an elevated ledge toward an illuminated gargoyle statue, with neon-lit towers punctuating a dark, stormy skyline. As the character passes the statue, the full moon breaks through the heavy clouds, dramatically transforming the lighting and casting a bright glow over the wet architecture. The scene then expands to reveal a prominent clock tower with blue-lit spires on the right, while the moon provides sharp backlighting against the sprawling noir city below.
